overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked futuristic downtown. The player character moves past towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements, covered walkways with vendors, and open plazas, showcasing neon-lit cyberpunk architecture and atmospheric wet streets.

events.description: player character begins walking forward along the wet sidewalk
moving away from the building wall into the open street view with visible traffic

agents.ego_description: player character in orange jacket walking along the sidewalk next to a building wall, moving toward the street

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving on the wet street with neon reflections

entered.detail: rain-soaked pavement reflecting cyan and orange neon lights
tall building with prominent vertical cyan neon light strips
large digital advertisement on the facade of the skyscraper
dark concrete wall of the adjacent building

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with the player character standing by a building wall on a rainy night in a futuristic city. The character starts walking along the wet concrete sidewalk, passing by a futuristic car on the street. The scene is dominated by a massive glass skyscraper with cyan neon lights and holographic billboards visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open intersection looking up at towering skyscrapers

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements above

agents.ego_description: walking while looking up at the massive buildings and glowing holographic signs overhead

entered.detail: large vertical advertisement displaying a woman's face in vivid colors
futuristic aircraft visible in the sky between buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal the full height of the city's architecture, showcasing massive holographic billboards and flying vehicles overhead. The glass skyscraper with cyan lighting shifts to the left as the player moves forward through the open intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with palm trees and moderate traffic

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street past palm trees and modern street lights

notable_agents.action: futuristic sports car driving past on the wet road with motion blur

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the street
tall modern street lamps with multiple floodlights
red traffic signal hanging over the intersection

segments.scene_description: The player walks along the open city street lined with palm trees and modern street lights. A futuristic sports car drives past on the right, and the cyan skyscraper remains visible on the left while the holographic billboards disappear behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered shopping walkway with food vendors

events.description: entering a covered walkway with shop overhangs and neon signs
passing a food vendor stall with glowing menu on the right

agents.ego_description: walking under building overhangs past shops and a street food vendor

notable_agents.action: vendor standing at a food stall with illuminated umbrella

entered.detail: building overhang providing shelter from the rain
small food cart with orange umbrella and neon menu lighting
green neon sign reading CHILL on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The player enters a covered walkway sheltered from the rain by building overhangs. A food vendor stall with a glowing orange umbrella appears on the right, and pedestrians walk in the opposite direction. The open street and palm trees disappear behind as the scene becomes more enclosed.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow walkway with pink neon storefront

events.description: passing a storefront with bright pink neon lighting casting colored reflections on the wet ground

agents.ego_description: walking past a storefront with a bright pink OPEN sign and large window displays

notable_agents.action: person standing against the wall silhouetted by the pink neon light

entered.detail: store with bright pink OPEN neon sign and large illuminated window display
wall illuminated with vibrant pink and magenta neon lights

segments.scene_description: The walkway narrows as the player passes a striking storefront bathed in pink neon light. An NPC stands against the glowing wall, and the food vendor is left behind. The environment feels more enclosed with building walls on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with circular building and benches

events.description: emerging from the covered walkway into an open plaza with a large circular building ahead
flying vehicles visible in the sky above the plaza between buildings

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza toward a large circular building, observing the surroundings and flying vehicles overhead

notable_agents.action: homeless person sitting on the ground near a concrete bench

entered.detail: large cylindrical building with multiple levels of neon signage and advertisements
blue-tinted concrete seating structures along the walkway
futuristic aircraft flying overhead between the skyscrapers

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the covered walkway into an open plaza featuring a distinctive circular building covered in neon advertisements. Concrete benches line the left side where a homeless person sits, and flying vehicles can be seen in the sky above. The environment opens up significantly compared to the previous narrow walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked futuristic city, transitioning from an open, towering streetscape into a narrow neon corridor before emerging into a wide urban plaza. It begins with the character walking along a wet concrete sidewalk past a futuristic car, while the camera tilts upward to reveal massive holographic billboards and flying vehicles soaring above a cyan-lit glass skyscraper. As the character moves through an open intersection lined with palm trees and passing sports cars, the scene shifts from the expansive street into a sheltered, covered walkway. The environment becomes increasingly enclosed, passing a food vendor with a glowing orange umbrella and a storefront bathed in pink neon light, before the narrow path finally opens up again. The journey concludes as the camera emerges into a broad plaza featuring a circular building covered in neon advertisements and concrete benches under a sky filled with flying traffic.
